name: Tughlaq Standard (Beasty)
author: ferg40
reasoning: Beasty's Tughlaq standard: the safe skeleton for the elephant-centric plan — stable economy first, elephants as the payoff instead of a gamble.

notes: 6 villager delhi sheep , 1 worker elephant to gold , 1 worker elephant scouting for sheep/resources. rally point 2 gold .
Rally point food until age 2 . repair 2x house for tughluqabad fort by gold .
When 200 gold move 2 villager delhi and worker elephant to stone .
Dome of the faith with 3 food villager delhi . Remacro for 7 villager delhi to stone . When age 2 completes move the 3 villager delhi to stone
Rally point gold until 6, and use worker elephant from scouting
Stable / barracks is very effective against FC enemies to counter man at arms 1 / lancer 3
Move dome of the faith villager delhi to stone , repair tughluqabad fort with gold villager delhi
Gather stone until 320 remaining so you have enough to fully upgrade tughluqabad fort bhakkar . Move to wood rally point wood
Rally point food and get wheelbarrow / elephant economics 1
Repair barracks / archery range / stable depending on enemy counters. Continually produce healer elephant .
Repair blacksmith and dump extra gold
